name: BIOVICA INTERNATIONAL
summary: Biovica International AB (publ), a biotechnology company, develops and commercializes blood-based biomarker assays that enhance the monitoring of cancer therapies and predict patient outcome in Europe, the United States, and Asia. It primarily focuses on breast cancer. The company develops DiviTum, a biomarker assay that measures the activity of the enzyme thymidine kinase-1 in blood serum or cell cultures. It serves pharmaceutical companies and contract research organizations. The company was incorporated in 2008 and is headquartered in Uppsala, Sweden.
